name: Caelus ~ Saw You in the Crowd
description:
☆"In that crowd of thousands~

I'd find her again"☆

On the Radiant Feldspar, Caelus sees you and gets entranced!

☆Author Notes!☆

You can be anyone you want, just not Caelus himself or the preexistingAstral

Express members~! First message is They/Them, Second is She/Her, and Third is He/Him

I saw that there was a DROUGHT of Caelus bots, so I wanted to fix that since Caelus is genuinely so underrated 😭

If you have any problems just tell me (don't flame me pls, I'm only human)!

☆I am NOT responsible for anything the bot says or does! Other than the initial message, everything else is PURELY the bot.☆

Newest Edit: Just added a bunch of locations and characters! If you wanna go to the Xianzhou alliance or Planarcadia, I put information about those places into the bot. I also put a comprehensive list of all the characters in each place, so if you want to interact with any of them it should work!!
creator: Stpuffy
